title: A Rare Bloom of Leptocylindrus minimus Reveals Seasonal HAB Risk in the Southern Waters of Portugal.
author: Kaharuddin, Aminah Faizah
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset provides the underlying quantitative data for the manuscript, documenting phytoplankton community dynamics off the Faro-Olhão inlet (FO) in the Algarve, Portugal from September 2020 to April 2021.   
   The repository includes:   
 
   Environmental Data: Chlorophyll  a  (Chl  a ) concentrations measured in mg m-3 and size-fractionated phytoplankton abundance.   
   Phytoplankton Community Composition: Cell counts (cells L-1) for Nanophytoplankton (<10 µm), Cryptophytes, Diatoms, and Dinoflagellates.   
   HAB Monitoring: Abundances for Harmful Algal Bloom (HAB)-related genera, specifically  Prorocentrum  spp.,  Dinophysis  spp.,  Pseudo-nitzschia  spp., and  Dictyocha  spp.   
   Tidal and Seasonal Context: Seasonal categorisation (Summer, Autumn, Winter, Spring) and tidal regime details (Ebb/Flood) associated with each sampling event.   
 
   Protocols used:    
 
   Chlorophyll  a  Determination: Calculated using spectrophotometric equations as per Lorenzen (1967) and Parsons et al. (1984)    
   Taxonomic Identification: Performed using the Utermöhl method (Utermöhl, 1958) for quantitative phytoplankton analysis.
steps_raw:

   The repository includes:

   HAB Monitoring: Abundances for Harmful Algal Bloom (HAB)-related genera, specifically  Prorocentrum  spp.,  Dinophysis  spp.,  Pseudo-nitzschia  spp., and  Dictyocha  spp.   
   Tidal and Seasonal Context: Seasonal categorisation (Summer, Autumn, Winter, Spring) and tidal regime details (Ebb/Flood) associated with each sampling event.
